creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sperber
Date: Sun Jul 22 19:23:59 2012
New Revision: 301344
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/301344

Log:
  - Update to version 3.11.3
  - Add LICENSE
  
  PR:           ports/169408
  Submitted by: KATO Tsuguru <tkato432 _at_ yahoo.com>
  Approved by:  beat (mentor)

Modified:
  head/devel/drpython/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/drpython/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/drpython/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/drpython/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/drpython/Makefile	Sun Jul 22 19:22:58 2012	(r301343)
+++ head/devel/drpython/Makefile	Sun Jul 22 19:23:59 2012	(r301344)
@@ -6,23 +6,25 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	drpython
-PORTVERSION=	3.11.1
-PORTREVISION=	3
+PORTVERSION=	3.11.3
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
-MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/DrPython%20Current/${PORTVERSION}
+MASTER_SITES=	SF/${PORTNAME}/DrPython%20%283.x%29/${PORTVERSION}
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMESUFFIX}
+DISTNAME=	DrPython_${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Highly customizable cross-platform ide to aid programming in Python
 
-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}_${PORTVERSION}
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
+
+WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/DrPython
 
 USE_ZIP=	yes
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
 PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	DrPython
 USE_WX=		2.6+
-WX_COMPS=	python
+WX_COMPS=	python:lib
 
 post-install:
 	@${ECHO_CMD} '#!/bin/sh' > ${WRKDIR}/drpython.sh

==============================================================================

+SIZE (DrPython_3.11.3.zip) = 636799
